prompt_text:
### Demographics: 80-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.8 kg; Height 155.9 cm; BMI 24.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 211mg/dL; current 167mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.2kg; 9 months ago 58.8kg; 6 months ago 54.9kg; 3 months ago 56.8kg; current 58.8kg), Height (12 months ago 155.9cm; 9 months ago 155.9cm; 6 months ago 155.9cm; 3 months ago 155.9cm; current 155.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 24.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 65U/L; 6 months ago 71U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 46U/L; 3 months ago 48U/L; current 48U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 40mg/g; 9 months ago 46mg/g; 6 months ago 64mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 60mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 45mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 181mg/dL; 6 months ago 160mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.45 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
